[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 0100011100 4
2 1110110110 7
3 0111110110 7
4 1001111101 7
5 1100010001 4
6 1010001111 6
7 0110111011 7
